name: OpenClaw Product Lens
purpose: Identify source material that can improve OpenClaw as a product, workflow, or system.
questions: Does this improve memory or context handling?
Does this improve tool integration or task flow?
Is it implementable with current infrastructure?
Is it differentiated enough to matter?
ignoreRules: Generic hype with no implementation pattern
Ideas already solved well enough internally
Low-signal content with no downstream artifact value
